inputs.label: standard
inputs.url: A national court records portal listing all published court judgments
inputs.data_needed: Case number, court name, judge name, case type (criminal/civil/family), filing date, judgment date, parties involved (anonymized), judgment summary, link to full judgment PDF
inputs.scope: Approximately 85,000 published judgments from 2018 to present
inputs.reason: Investigation into sentencing patterns across different courts and judges

inputs.label: minimal
inputs.url: A city government website listing all public meeting agendas and minutes
inputs.data_needed: Meeting date, committee name, agenda items, links to minutes PDF
inputs.scope: All meetings from 2020 to present, approximately 1,200 records
inputs.reason: Tracking which topics are discussed most frequently in city government

inputs.label: european
inputs.url: The EU Transparency Register listing all registered lobbyists and their declared activities
inputs.data_needed: Organization name, registration number, country of registration, lobbyist category (in-house, consultancy, NGO, trade association), declared budget range, number of persons involved, EU institutions targeted, legislative files declared, date of registration, date of last update
inputs.scope: Approximately 12,500 registered entities. Full backfill plus monthly updates.
inputs.reason: Investigation into which industries spend the most on EU lobbying and whether declared lobbying activity correlates with legislative outcomes
